race.description: Sportsbet Same Race Multi Maiden Plate
race.comment: SICILIAN PRINCESS (12) is ready to fire fourth-up after launching late to just miss here two weeks ago. She gets in light with the claim, will relish rising to 1400m and looks the one they have to beat. THUNDARA (14) comes through the same race and wasn't far away in fourth at just her second start. She's sure to have taken improvement and keeping Holder is a positive. JUMBO JET (4) never looked likely when buried back on debut but warmed into it late. He draws far better this time and stepping to 1400m gives him the chance to play a much bigger role. SILENT ANSWER (13) only got going late when resuming at Pakenham and will be fitter, though the draw likely sees him a long way back again. SHE REX (7) should roll forward and give a sight third-up.
